segments: If it ___1___ (rain) tomorrow, we will stay at home.
exercises.analysis: 条件从句用一般现在时，主语 it 是第三人称单数，rain 加 s。
English 是动作承受者，用一般现在时的被动语态 is spoken。

segments: When I ___1___ (be) a child, I lived in the countryside.
exercises.analysis: when 引导时间从句，描述过去的状况，用一般过去时 was。

segments: The letter ___1___ (write) by my sister yesterday.
exercises.analysis: The letter 是承受者，yesterday 表示过去时，被动语态为 was written。

segments: Please wash your hands before you ___1___ (eat).
exercises.analysis: before 引导时间从句，从句中不用将来时，用一般现在时 eat。
by next week 表示将来时间，用一般将来时的被动语态 will be finished。

segments: While she ___1___ (cook), her son was doing homework.
exercises.analysis: while 引导时间从句，强调两个动作同时进行，用过去进行时 was cooking。

segments: The window ___1___ (break) by Tom. It needs to be repaired.
exercises.analysis: The window 是承受者，根据语境描述已发生的事件，用一般过去时被动 was broken。

segments: I will call you as soon as I ___1___ (arrive) there.
exercises.analysis: as soon as 引导时间从句，从句中不用将来时，用一般现在时 arrive。
must 是情态动词，含情态动词的被动语态为 must be + 过去分词。
